upcomingMovementsList.title: Arise Asia 2026
upcomingMovementsList.subtitle: July 27-31, 2026
upcomingMovementsList.description:
There's a joy that makes sacrifice worth it. A joy that carried Jesus to the cross. A joy that now inspires us to serve others.

He gave everything for the joy of seeing lives restored, and that same joy now fuels us to go.

This is our moment. The time is now. Eyes fixed on Jesus.

The question is...will you join us?

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Cebu (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: December 2, 2023
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Philippines Regionwide Youth Conference will be kicking things off in Central Visayas—Cebu City, where the fire will first ignite! 🔥

This conference is organized by the Philippine Missions Association (PMA), Haggai Cebu, and other partners.

We are excited to feature pre-recorded sessions from three esteemed speakers who were highlights of the Arise Asia 2023 conference:

* Wayne Chen, Director of Radius Asia, with a session titled The Greatest Treasure
* Tom Lin, President & CEO of InterVarsity Christian Fellowship, presenting The Greatest Pursuit
* Sarah Bruel, Director of Revive Europe, sharing insights on The Greatest Purpose

Our desire is to activate more intercessors, inspire intentional discipleship, and encourage involvement.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise GenSan (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: January 18, 2025
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Philippines Regionwide Conference made its way to the South-the home of champions, General Santos City!

The venue was filled with over 590 Game Changers and 22 passionate organizations, resulting in 84 young people committing to long-term cross-cultural involvement.

This conference was organized by the Philippine Missions Association (PMA), the Philippine Council of Evangelical Churches (PCEC), The Word for Everyone Ministries International Inc., and other partners.

The one-day event was packed with inspiring guest speakers, including Rev. David Ro, Rev. Seth Kim, Wayne Chen, and Bishop Noel Pantoja. It also featured pre-recorded sessions from two distinguished speakers who were key highlights of the Arise Asia 2023 conference: Tom Lin and Sarah Breuel.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Dumaguete (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: March 29, 2025
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Philippines Regionwide Conference went to the City of Gentle People - Dumaguete City!

The venue was filled with 246 Game Changers and 7 passionate organizations, resulting in 89 commitments including 13 young people committing to long-term cross-cultural involvement.

This conference was organized by the Philippine Missions Association (PMA), the Philippine Council of Evangelical Churches (PCEC), and other partners.

It featured pre-recorded sessions from three esteemed speakers who were highlights of the Arise Asia 2023 conference:

* Wayne Chen, Director of Radius Asia, with a session titled The Greatest Treasure
* Tom Lin, President & CEO of InterVarsity Christian Fellowship, presenting The Greatest Pursuit
* Sarah Bruel, Director of Revive Europe, sharing insights on The Greatest Purpose

Our desire is to activate more intercessors, inspire intentional discipleship, and encourage involvement.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise La Union, Doulos Hope (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: May 10, 2025
pastMovementsList.description:
From the vibrant shores of La Union to communities across Asia, Arise La Union ignited hearts with a fresh passion for participation—all while uniquely hosted aboard the MV Doulos Hope. This unforgettable gathering marked more than just a conference; it was the spark of a movement.

God moved powerfully in Northern Luzon as 97 young game changers came together, representing 7 churches with one heart—to say YES to God's call.

Organized by the Philippine Missions Association (PMA), Philippine Council of Evangelical Churches, OM Philippines, and Doulos Hope.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Manila (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: June 4, 2025
pastMovementsList.description:
We're bringing the Arise Asia Movement to **Mega Manila**, and it's going to be 🔥!

**3 DAYS. 3 LOCATIONS. ONE PURPOSE:** To challenge the next generation to go and serve.

The **Arise Philippines Regionwide Conference** is here to ignite your heart for God's calling. It's time to worship, learn, and take action—because the fire to boldly GO will keep burning! Are you ready to rise and answer the call? Join us for back-to-back conferences across Mega Manila!

Organized by the **Philippine Missions Association (PMA), Philippine Council of Evangelical Churches (PCEC),** and partners.

For more details, contact us:

📧 **Email:** [arisephilippines@ariseasia.org](mailto:arisephilippines@ariseasia.org)

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Asia 2023
pastMovementsList.subtitle: July 25-29, 2023
pastMovementsList.description: This historic event was organized to unite and equip believers with a shared vision of faith and service throughout Asia. We praise God for the powerful work He accomplished during these five days, as lives were transformed, faith was strengthened, and a renewed passion for cross-cultural involvement was ignited. Check out the summary video for a recap of the conference.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Hong Kong
pastMovementsList.subtitle: July 20-21, 2024
pastMovementsList.description:
Stay Alive, Go Beyond!🔋

In a city grappling with emptiness and despair, how can we continue to pursue our future, our calling, and our mission? This conference calls on us to seek guidance from Jesus as we navigate these challenges.

We invite believers aged 18-29, including those new to the movement and eager to learn more, to join us in Wu Kai Sha for a time of teaching, mentoring, and transformation.

The conference will be conducted in Cantonese/Mandarin and aims to equip and inspire participants with the tools, knowledge, and encouragement needed to move beyond their struggles and embrace their mission with renewed passion.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Indonesia
pastMovementsList.subtitle: July 31 - August 3, 2024
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Indonesia conference is a gathering focused on equipping the next generation of young Christian leaders. This conference specifically targets youth, students, and young professionals between the ages of 18 and 35. 🤫

The conference aims to ignite a passion for Christ in the hearts of its participants by equipping them with the necessary tools, knowledge, and inspiration. It intends to empower and mobilize these young individuals to be catalysts for change in their communities and beyond.

The conference takes place in Bali, attracting around 1000 participants. It features various sessions, workshops, and talks from experienced speakers and pastors. These sessions cover a wide range of topics, including discipleship, spiritual formation, leadership, and cross-cultural ministry.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Myanmar
pastMovementsList.subtitle: October 15-16, 2024
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Myanmar conference represents a significant leap of faith for the local team. In these challenging times, the gathering aims to bring hope and inspire young people to go and serve.

Rooted in 2 Corinthians 4:8-9, which states, "We are afflicted in every way, but not crushed; perplexed, but not driven to despair; persecuted, but not forsaken; struck down, but not destroyed," the conference encourages resilience and faith.

The theme of Arise Myanmar 2024 is "Beyond the Limits." Instead of simply going through the routines of "Christian Living," it aims to inspire participants to live courageously and share boldly, reaching beyond their normal boundaries to bring hope to those who have not yet heard.

The conference took place in Yangon, Myanmar, on October 15-16, 2024 with over 700 participants. It featured international speakers, breakout sessions, testimonies, and worship time.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Nepal
pastMovementsList.subtitle: October 20-23, 2024
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Nepal 2024 conference marked a significant milestone, evolving from 25 Arise Asia 2023 alumni to hundreds of mobilized volunteers and thousands of next-generation participants.

The theme for the conference, "Beyond Barriers," encapsulated the spirit of the gathering. This historic event aimed to empower young people to transcend individual barriers and share their faith in areas that had yet to hear it.

Worship sessions were led by the Arise Nepal worship team, the Nepali Isai Mandali worship team, and Awaken Generation from Singapore.

Spanning four days, the conference featured a variety of activities, including plenary sessions, panel discussions, workshops, games, and opportunities for fellowship.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Latino 2024
pastMovementsList.subtitle: November 11-14, 2024
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Latino conference is calling young adults like you! The Arise movement began in Thailand in 2023, when it brought together 1,800 passionate young people from 37 countries, all eager to bring about change where it is needed most. Now it's your turn to take part in this incredible journey. 🛣️

This conference is specifically designed for young people aged 18 to 35. It's not just another event – it's a launchpad for inspiration, training, and connection. Here's what you can look forward to:

* Inspiring Sessions: Hear from leaders who have firsthand experience in serving across diverse contexts.
* Practical Tools: Gain access to resources that will empower you to make a tangible impact.
* Collaborative Opportunities: Meet like-minded individuals and form networks that can amplify your efforts.
* Hands-On Workshops: Participate in interactive sessions that equip you with the skills you need to serve effectively.

Throughout these four days in Orlando, Florida, you'll engage in plenary sessions, workshops, and lectures covering a variety of topics related to serving communities across the world. This is more than just learning; it's about preparing to take action.

Don't Miss Out! Seize this opportunity to be part of a global movement. Connect with others who share your passion and vision for making a difference. We're expecting over 500 energetic and passionate young adults to join us. Your journey starts here.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Bangladesh
pastMovementsList.subtitle: March 13-15, 2025
pastMovementsList.description:
Arise Bangladesh 2025 was the first interdenominational youth conference in Bangladesh, held from March 13-15 at BBCF Prayer Garden, bringing together nearly 600 participants from across the country to be inspired and equipped for service.

Themed "A Call to Serve", the conference focused on uniting and mobilizing young believers to share their faith widely. Organized by the Board of Youth and Renewal of the National Christian Fellowship of Bangladesh, the event featured renowned national and international speakers who challenged and empowered attendees to step into their calling. With passionate workshops, impactful plenary sessions, engaging workshops, panel discussions, and mentorship opportunities, Arise Bangladesh 2025 strengthened collaboration among 49 denominations and organizations, sparking a movement of young believers committed to answering God's call in Bangladesh and beyond.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Tagaytay (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: May 1, 2026
pastMovementsList.description:
The Arise Philippines City-wide Youth Conference took place in Laguna last May 2026!

With churches and partner organizations united, Arise Tagaytay brought together young people from across the province for a day filled with worship, challenge, and vision—awakening many to the call of long-term cross-cultural involvement and a life of being sent.

A special part of the program also featured interactive workshops, where participants were able to go deeper into understanding different cultural contexts and the realities of cross-cultural service.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Imus (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: May 2, 2026
pastMovementsList.description:
Gathering in unity with local churches and partner organizations, Arise Imus became a significant moment for young people across the province—an atmosphere marked by worship, honest reflection, and a deep stirring toward God's global vision.

Throughout the day, many were awakened to the reality of long-term cross-cultural serving and the invitation to be sent with purpose into the nations.

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Laguna (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: May 9, 2026
pastMovementsList.description:
Another Arise Philippines City-wide Youth Conference took place in Laguna last May 2026!

With local churches and partner organizations coming together, Arise Laguna gathered young people from across the province for a powerful day of worship, challenge, and vision for long-term cross-cultural involvement—stirring many to respond to God's call to go and be sent.

The gathering also featured impactful updates from key leaders serving in different nations, sharing real stories and insights on what God is doing in their respective fields. These testimonies deeply engaged the youth, stirring greater passion and urgency to be part of what God is doing among the nations

pastMovementsList.title: Arise Bataan (Philippines)
pastMovementsList.subtitle: May 16, 2026
pastMovementsList.description:
Arise Bataan brought together young people from different churches across the province for a day centered on God's heart for the nations. Held in the middle of May 2026, the gathering created space for worship, learning, and meaningful conversations about serving and long-term involvement in cross-cultural service.

Participants heard firsthand stories from ministry leaders serving in various parts of the world, offering a glimpse into the opportunities and challenges of cross-cultural ministry. These testimonies inspired many to consider their role in God's global vision, with several taking steps toward deeper commitment, prayer, and future service among the nations.
